nasb.text: Saul listened to the voice of Jonathan, and Saul vowed, “As the Lord lives, he shall not be put to death.”

esv.text: And Saul listened to the voice of Jonathan. Saul swore, “As the Lord lives, he shall not be put to death.”

cnv.text: 掃羅聽了約拿單的話，就起誓，說：“我指著永活的耶和華起誓，大衛必不會被殺死。”

ccb.text: 扫罗听了约拿单的话，就凭永活的耶和华起誓说：“我不杀大卫。”
